<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>{{{type|Document}}} {{{number|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{subject|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-above" style="font-size:100%">{{{subject}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{type|}}}|<tr><th>Type</th><td>{{{type}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{status|}}}|<tr><th>Status</th><td>{{{status}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{date_issued|}}}|<tr><th>Issued</th><td>{{{date_issued}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{issued_by|}}}|<tr><th>Issued by</th><td>{{{issued_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{date_submitted|}}}|<tr><th>Submitted</th><td>{{{date_submitted}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{submitted_by|}}}|<tr><th>Submitted by</th><td>{{{submitted_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{date_response|}}}|<tr><th>Response</th><td>{{{date_response}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{response_by|}}}|<tr><th>Response by</th><td>{{{response_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{date_reviewed|}}}|<tr><th>Reviewed</th><td>{{{date_reviewed}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{reviewed_by|}}}|<tr><th>Reviewed by</th><td>{{{reviewed_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{spec_section|}}}|<tr><th>Spec section</th><td>{{{spec_section}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{areas|}}}|<tr><th>Areas</th><td>{{{areas}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{drawings|}}}|<tr><th>Drawings</th><td>{{{drawings}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{specs|}}}|<tr><th>Specs</th><td>{{{specs}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{cost_impact|}}}|<tr><th>Cost impact</th><td>{{{cost_impact}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{time_impact|}}}|<tr><th>Time impact</th><td>{{{time_impact}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox construction
| type           = RFI
| number         = RFI-042
| subject        = Clarifier wall reinforcement at penetrations
| status         = Closed
| date_issued    = 2026-01-15
| issued_by      = Contractor
| date_response  = 2026-01-22
| response_by    = Engineer of Record
| areas          = [[Area 03 — Primary Clarifiers]]
| drawings       = [[Drawing:S-302]], [[Drawing:S-305]]
| specs          = [[Spec:03 30 00]]
| cost_impact    = None
| time_impact    = None
}}
</pre>

Also works for submittals:
<pre>
{{Infobox construction
| type           = Submittal
| number         = SUB-033000-001
| subject        = Concrete mix design — 4,500 PSI structural
| status         = Approved as Noted
| date_submitted = 2026-02-01
| submitted_by   = Contractor
| date_reviewed  = 2026-02-10
| reviewed_by    = Engineer of Record
| spec_section   = [[Spec:03 30 00]]
| areas          = [[Area 03|Area 03]], [[Area 04|Area 04]]
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
